title: 02877_Sundial_A_Family_of_Highly_Capable_Time_Series_Foundation_Models
positive_examples: Facilitates out-of-the-box forecasting for various applications such as energy planning, weather forecasting, and financial risk prevention.
Enhances the reliability of decision-making and streamlines the forecasting pipeline for practitioners.
Provides a trillion-level time series dataset (TimeBench) beneficial to the research community.
